details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest two invoices linked to the operations manager at the tax firm.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification check passes: attachments were both previously read and are ordered newest-first (2026-01-19 then 2025-12-18), recipient matches canonical Miles record, subject quoting is YAML-safe. Next perform inbox cleanup per workflow.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with reply draft and two invoice attachments.

next_step.current_state: Task actions complete: processed next inbox email, created outbound draft with requested invoices, and removed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after successful completion.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by drafting a reply email to miles@novak.example with the two oldest invoices linked to the tax firm's operations manager (Claudia Reiter), and then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read 99_system workflows before task work, treated inbox frontmatter as canonical email metadata, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, used canonical entity resolution for ops manager, created outbound record per sending-email workflow, ordered attachments newest-first per enforced outbox rule, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file requested 'oldest 2 invoices linked to the ops manager at the tax firm'. Canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/claudia.md identifies Claudia Reiter as operations manager at helios-tax; finance records show related_entity Claudia Reiter on invoices INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19), which are the two oldest helios-linked invoices. Outbound draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md addressed to verified sender miles@novak.example, with exact attachment paths, then processed inbox item was deleted per workflow.
